# Q1 readback — confirm lookup built (data exfil volume)

**Dataset**: `gx_07_flows` (synthetic scenario lab dataset — the technique transfers to your real datasets)

Data-exfiltration by volume — rank egress by bytes moved per host/destination. Q1 readback — confirm lookup built.

```sql
dataset = gx_07_flows | fields host, dst, bytes_out, bytes_in | limit 5
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 5). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
